# hermes-tweet

Use Hermes Tweet when a Hermes Agent session needs X/Twitter data or controlled
X actions through Xquik.

It supports scrape/search tweets, search Twitter/X, read tweet replies, look up
users, monitor tweets or accounts, export followers, post tweets/replies, send
DMs, and automate X actions after explicit approval.
